title: Intensely Crispy Norwegian Hake Skillet
description: A pungent and crispy Norwegian dish featuring hake, perfect for a post-workout meal, this recipe is diabetic-friendly and full of flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced capernwurst sausage and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the hake fillets to the skillet, skin side up, and cook for 3-4 minutes, until the skin is crispy.
Flip the hake fillets over and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, until cooked through.
Season the hake with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the hake hot, with the onion and sausage mixture spooned over the top.
